title: EDCMBone Turn Schema v1
description: Canonical Turn object. One or more merged utterances from the same actor, with surface tokens.

utterance_ids.description: Ordered list of source utterance_ids merged into this turn.

raw_text.description: Merged raw text; utterances joined with newline. Never modified after construction.

tokens_surface.description: Surface tokenization of raw_text per tokenizer.py rules.

t_start.description: Optional start timestamp inherited from first utterance (ISO 8601 preferred).

t_end.description: Optional end timestamp inherited from last utterance (ISO 8601 preferred).

source_refs.description: Optional pointers to page/line/audio segments from merged utterances.

forced_boundary.description: True if any merged utterance was a forced boundary marker.

contains_quote.description: True if any merged utterance raw_text contains a double-quote character.

overlap.description: True if any merged utterance raw_text contained an [overlap] annotation.

interrupted_by.description: actor_id of the interrupting speaker, if known; otherwise null.

notes.description: Optional free-text annotations added during parsing.
